EmailTemplate.description: Container Service Email Template for Case when its Rejected.
EmailTemplate.name: CONTAINER Service Case Rejected Template
EmailTemplate.subject: Your case has been Rejected
EmailTemplate.textOnly: The following case has been Rejected Company: {!Case.Account} Case: {!Case.CaseNumber}: {!Case.Subject} Owner: {!Case.OwnerFullName} Click on the link to access the case: {!Case.Link}
